centralSchoolAdministrators.title: School administrators

centralSchoolAdministrators.temporaryPasswordHint: Deliver this temporary password through an approved secure channel, then close this message.

centralSchoolUsers.title: School users
centralSchoolUsers.description: Manage users, roles, direct permissions, and account security for the selected school.
centralSchoolUsers.descriptionForSchool: Manage users, roles, direct permissions, and account security for {school}.
centralSchoolUsers.createDescription: Create a user only within the school selected in this Central IT route.
centralSchoolUsers.authenticationDescription: Leave the temporary password empty to generate it once on the server.
centralSchoolUsers.temporaryPasswordDescription: Copy and deliver it through an approved secure channel. It will be cleared when this dialog is closed.
centralSchoolUsers.passwordOptionalHint: Leave empty to have the server generate a temporary password.
centralSchoolUsers.passwordMismatch: The password confirmation does not match.
centralSchoolUsers.rolesDescription: Only roles belonging to the selected school can be assigned.
centralSchoolUsers.directPermissionsDescription: Direct permissions are scoped to this school. Central permissions cannot be granted to a school user.
centralSchoolUsers.listDescription: {count} users returned by the selected school scope.
centralSchoolUsers.emptyDescription: Users will appear when the selected school has memberships.
centralSchoolUsers.noResultsDescription: Change or clear the filters to see other users.
centralSchoolUsers.roleChangeReason: Reason for role changes when removing access
centralSchoolUsers.effectivePermissionsDescription: Read-only permissions calculated by the backend from roles and direct overrides.
centralSchoolUsers.effectivePermissionsUnavailable: Effective permissions are not available for your permission set.
centralSchoolUsers.permissionChangeReason: Mandatory reason for this permission change
centralSchoolUsers.reasonAndPermissionRequired: Select at least one permission and provide a reason.
centralSchoolUsers.activityEmpty: No auditable activity has been returned for this user.
centralSchoolUsers.resetPasswordDescription: This is a sensitive operation and requires an audit reason and confirmation.
centralSchoolUsers.disableDescription: Disabling a user requires a reason and is blocked for the last active school administrator.
centralSchoolUsers.enableDescription: Re-enable this school account after confirming the action.
centralSchoolUsers.confirmSensitiveAction: I confirm this sensitive account operation.
centralSchoolUsers.confirmationRequired: Provide the required reason and confirm this sensitive operation.
centralSchoolUsers.confirmPermissionChangeDescription: Review the selected permissions and confirm this sensitive access change.

documents.circularsDescription: Circular records loaded from the specialized circulars endpoint.
documents.needsReplyDescription: Documents that still require a reply according to the verified backend filter.

documents.auditReasonDescription: Required for marking sent, marking received, deleting, and archiving this record.

documents.archiveReasonDescription: Archive is the normal business action. Delete remains exceptional and still requires the same audit reason.

schoolUsers.title: School users and RBAC
schoolUsers.description: User lifecycle, role assignment, direct permission grants, and effective permission review within the active school context.
schoolUsers.searchPlaceholder: Search by email or full name
schoolUsers.emptyDescription: Users will appear here when the backend returns school users for the active school.
schoolUsers.filteredEmptyTitle: No users match the current filters
schoolUsers.filteredEmptyDescription: Adjust the current filters to review more users.
schoolUsers.listDescription: Showing {count} school users from the verified backend scope.
schoolUsers.createDescription: Create a school-scoped user account using the verified admin users contract.
schoolUsers.basicInfoDescription: Only backend-supported fields are collected here. Passwords are submitted once and never persisted in the browser.
schoolUsers.confirmPasswordDescription: Re-enter the password exactly as it should be delivered to the user.
schoolUsers.passwordGuidance: Use a strong temporary password and share it only through an approved secure channel.
schoolUsers.passwordMismatch: The password confirmation does not match.
schoolUsers.teacherCodeRequired: Teacher code is required for the selected profile type.
schoolUsers.rolesSectionDescription: Roles are loaded from the backend and applied using stable backend identifiers.
schoolUsers.createFailureHint: The user could not be created with the current backend response.
schoolUsers.detailDescription: Profile, roles, direct permissions, effective permissions, and account security for the selected school user.
schoolUsers.temporaryPasswordDescription: Display this temporary password once, then deliver it through an approved secure channel.
schoolUsers.profileSectionDescription: Verified user identity and school-scoped metadata.
schoolUsers.accountSecurityDescription: Password resets and other sensitive operations require explicit audit intent and remain server-side.
schoolUsers.securityAuditNoticeDescription: Sensitive mutations remain protected by server-managed school scope, CSRF, and permission checks.
schoolUsers.accountActiveDescription: This account can access the school according to its active role assignments and effective permissions.
schoolUsers.accountInactiveDescription: This account is disabled for this school and cannot use its school session until it is enabled again.
schoolUsers.confirmDisable: Deactivate this account and suspend its membership in this school?
schoolUsers.confirmEnable: Activate this account and restore its active membership in this school?
schoolUsers.selfActivationProtected: For account safety, you cannot deactivate the account currently signed in.
schoolUsers.editDescription: Only backend-approved editable fields are sent through the school BFF.
schoolUsers.rolesManagementDescription: Replace role assignments carefully and use explicit reasons when changing direct permissions.
schoolUsers.assignedRolesDescription: Role membership is loaded from the backend for the active school only.
schoolUsers.permissionsCatalogDescription: Effective access is determined by backend permission codes, role inheritance, and direct grants.
schoolUsers.permissionReasonPlaceholder: Audit reason for grant or revoke
schoolUsers.permissionReasonRequired: An audit reason is required before granting or revoking direct permissions.
schoolUsers.permissionDescriptionFallback: No backend description was returned for this permission code.
schoolUsers.effectivePermissionsDescription: Final permission set returned by the backend after role inheritance and direct overrides.
schoolUsers.noEffectivePermissionsDescription: The backend did not return any effective permissions for this user.
schoolUsers.resetPasswordDescription: Reset the password through the verified backend route. The new password is never stored in client state after submission.
schoolUsers.finalConfirmationLabel: I confirm that this reset is authorized and will be communicated securely.
schoolUsers.finalConfirmationRequired: You must confirm the final password reset action.
schoolUsers.confirmRoleReplacement: This change removes one or more current roles. Continue?
